title: rubus × caudatifolius
intro: Rubus × caudatifolius, also known as a hybrid blackberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the blackberry (Rubus argutus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × caudatifolius are attributed to its anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × caudatifolius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Rubus × caudatifolius can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
